hero.eyebrow: Vetted creator sourcing for app campaigns
hero.title: Find standout creators for your next app campaign.
hero.description: Skip cold outreach and move straight to qualified creators who already understand digital products, short-form hooks, and conversion-focused content.
hero.supportingNote: Built for software brands that want better creator fit, less noise, and faster campaign momentum.

intro.title: A cleaner path from campaign to creator connection.
intro.description: UGC Hits helps software brands move from idea to shortlist without relying on cold outreach, generic marketplaces, or noisy applicant pools.

steps.title: Post your campaign
steps.description: Share what you are promoting, who you want to reach, and what kind of creator you need. Brands can define niche, budget, deliverables, audience, and creative direction before the campaign goes live.
bullets: Define the product and campaign goal
Set creator fit, budget, and deliverables
Launch one campaign with one listing fee

steps.title: Review qualified applicants
steps.description: Review creators who apply through the platform and compare the signals that matter: content style, niche, platform strengths, audience profile, and overall fit for the campaign.

steps.title: Connect and move forward
steps.description: Once you find the right fit, message creators directly on the platform and coordinate the next step. UGC Hits is built to help the relationship start quickly and cleanly.
bullets: Clean handoff from sourcing to execution
Optional managed support for larger campaigns

matching.title: We focus on fit, not just creator volume.
matching.description: UGC Hits is designed around campaign quality. Creators are reviewed before joining, and campaigns are surfaced to creators whose profiles align with the product, audience, and content style you need.

pricing.title: Two ways to get your campaign moving.
pricing.description: Start with a one-time campaign listing or choose managed support if you want a more hands-on execution partner.

plans.name: UGC Creator Sourcing
plans.description: Post one campaign, receive qualified applicants from our vetted network, and connect directly with the creators you want to move forward with.

plans.name: Managed Campaign Support
plans.description: For brands that want help with creator sourcing, communication, and campaign coordination from start to finish.

features.title: Built for tech brands looking for better creator sourcing.

items.title: High-signal applications only
items.description: We prioritize fit over volume. Skip the noise and only review creators who actually match your campaign and understand your niche.

items.title: Vetted creator network
items.description: Creators are reviewed before joining, which helps keep quality higher across the network.

items.title: Cleaner review workflow
items.description: Brands review structured creator information instead of stitching together DMs, spreadsheets, and platform searches.

founder.title: Built with a creator’s understanding of what brands actually need.
founder.name: Tsenguun
summary: UGC Hits is shaped around the belief that creator sourcing works better when quality, fit, and product understanding come first.
That creator-led perspective informs how campaigns are reviewed, how creators are surfaced, and how brands move from sourcing to execution with less wasted time.

faq.title: Questions brands ask before they post

items.question: What is UGC Hits?
items.answer: UGC Hits is a curated creator sourcing platform for app, software, and digital product campaigns.

items.question: Who is UGC Hits for?
items.answer: UGC Hits is built for software brands, consumer apps, SaaS companies, startups, and digital products that want stronger UGC creator sourcing without relying on cold outreach.

items.question: How does pricing work?
items.answer: The self-serve plan is a one-time listing fee for one campaign. Brands can also choose a custom managed support plan for more hands-on help.

items.question: How are creators selected?
items.answer: Creators are reviewed before joining the platform. Profile quality, niche relevance, short-form content ability, and overall fit for the network all matter.

items.question: What happens after I find the right creators?
items.answer: Once there is a fit, you can message creators directly on the platform and coordinate the next steps of the campaign from there.

items.question: What if I get no applicants?
items.answer: Every campaign is reviewed before launch, and we only approve campaigns we believe are a strong fit for our network. If your campaign does not attract the right applicants, we offer a money-back guarantee.

footer.note: Curated creator sourcing for software brands.
